query:
SELECT u.open_id, u.name, us.task_instruction, us.investment_rules, us.data_library, us.updated_at
FROM user_settings us
JOIN users u ON us.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.open_id = (SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'owner_open_id' LIMIT 1)
   OR u.role = 'admin'
ORDER BY us.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
